title: 3. TongGuan (88.01) and TongShan (88.02)
text:
Gastritis is manifested in stomachache and frequent vomiting. MenJin is often used for those symptoms. There
are various kinds of stomach diseases, such as ulceration in duodenum and the stomach. For treating these
conditions, Master Tung always used SiHuaZhong with pricking method to induce bleeding, and then puncture
TongGuan and TongShan. For treating stomach diseases, Master Tung first used pricking method, and then
puncturing method.
